title: Rhino
description: A fork of Mozilla's Rhino library, modified for use in mods
body:
A fork of Mozilla's Rhino library, modified for use in mods. This library adds JavaScript engine Rhino that supports ES6 and doesn't depend on built-in Nashorn engine that got removed in Java 15.

This mod doesn't do anything on it's own, it's a library used by [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs).

[![](https://links.latvian.dev/links.png?mr=rhino)](https://links.latvian.dev/)
